verdict_reasoning: HSPA5/BiP/GRP78 is canonically an ER-luminal HSP70 chaperone, but it is well-documented to translocate to the outer leaflet of the plasma membrane on stressed and tumor cells (cell-surface GRP78, csGRP78), where it is the target of multiple clinical antibody, ADC, CAR-T, and peptide programs. The cancer/stress-induced ecto-pool qualifies as contextual surface accessibility via cell-state induction, even though baseline localization is ER-luminal.
